q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares VIP to New customers (two observed groups) but does not compare the observed value to any expected/baseline/typical value from the prompt.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the values (43,288.75 vs 6,174.40, 306 vs 1,283 orders, 13.2M vs 7.9M) and provides a clear 'supported' verdict.
